prompt: Explain speculative decoding for language model inference in three concise sentences.
A GPU benchmark improves from 42 tokens/s to 57 tokens/s. Compute the percentage speedup and explain what this means for inference throughput.
Write a small Python function that computes time per output token from total latency and number of generated tokens.
Summarize why lower precision draft models may both help and hurt speculative decoding performance.
List the GPU profiling signals you would inspect to decide whether LLM decoding is compute-bound or memory-bound.
